results.overview: In this episode of Comedy Central Presents we will see comedian Franco Escamilla in "The Comedian with the Hat."
results.title: Comedy Central Presents: Franco Escamilla

results.overview: Aspiring comic Rupert Pupkin attempts to achieve success in show business by stalking his idol, a late night talk-show host who craves his own privacy.
results.title: The King of Comedy

results.overview: A director struggles with a difficult sex scene between a young actor and actress who can't stand one another. Aided by her loyal assistant, she is hell-bent on getting the scene right without compromise.
results.title: Sex Is Comedy

results.overview: A no-nonsense cop has a flair for fashion and a celebrity takes revenge on the paparazzi in a collection of comedic sketches.
results.title: InAPPropriate Comedy

results.overview: A nutty inventor, his frustrated wife, a philosopher cousin, his much younger fiancée, a randy doctor, and a free-thinking nurse spend a summer weekend in and around a stunning - and possibly magical - country house.
results.title: A Midsummer Night's Sex Comedy

results.original_title: Comedy Central Roast of Justin Bieber
results.overview: Several roasters, and the master himself Kevin Hart, make fun of Justin Bieber.
results.title: Comedy Central Roast of Justin Bieber

results.overview: An undertaker who hasn't had any 'customers' in a long time is forced to pay one year's back-rent. To get money he starts to kill people, which brings absurd results.
results.title: The Comedy of Terrors

results.overview: He's a kamikaze gambler. A one-arm cuddler. And if his fly is down, so be it. A night of sly riffs and slow burns.
results.title: Hannibal Buress: Comedy Camisado

results.overview: Indifferent to the notion of inheriting his father's estate, a restless, aging New Yorker passes time with his friends in games of mock sincerity, irreverence, and recreational cruelty towards those around them.
results.title: The Comedy

results.overview: Jason Carmichael is a popular New York City playwright in desperate need of a new writing partner who can provide him with inspiration. Phoebe Craddock is a small-town teacher who aspires to be a writer.
results.title: Romantic Comedy

results.overview: A group of strangers from different countries end up on Rio's beaches. Seeking self-fulfillment, they look for answers to existential questions. Yet it isn't until their different paths cross that they begin to understand why they came.
results.title: Rio Sex Comedy

results.overview: In his first standalone “Entre Nos” special, Ian Lara explores the lessons learned during the pandemic, including common problems of New Yorkers during travel, and offers some essential advice to avoid risky dating experiences.
results.title: Ian Lara: Romantic Comedy

results.overview: Do you have to be miserable to be funny? More than sixty comedians—including stand-ups, writers, actors, and directors from the US, Canada, and abroad—take on this question, sharing anecdotes and insights with lively enthusiasm.
results.title: Misery Loves Comedy

results.original_title: Blue Collar Comedy Tour: The Movie
results.overview: The comedic stylings of four sort-of famous funnymen are brought to the big screen courtesy of this 2002 documentary.
results.title: Blue Collar Comedy Tour: The Movie

results.overview: This documentary goes beneath the surface of our favorite films, seeking to better understand the way we view love, relationships, and romance. From clumsy meet cutes to rain-soaked declarations of love, these films reflect our experiences but are often just as problematic as they are comforting. Helped by a chorus of critics, actors, and filmmakers, and original songs by her band Summer Camp, director Elizabeth Sankey embarks on a journey of investigation and self-discovery.
results.title: Romantic Comedy

results.original_title: Louis C.K.: Live at The Comedy Store
results.overview: This material was developed and prepared over the last year or so, mostly in comedy clubs. This special kind of goes back to when he used to just make noises and be funny for no particular reason. It felt right to him to shoot this special in a club to give it that live immediate intimate feeling. The show is about an hour long. The opening act, who is seen at the beginning (good place for an opening act) is Jay London. One of his favorite club comics going way back to the late 80s when he first started in working in New York.
results.title: Louis C.K.: Live at The Comedy Store

results.overview: The Original Kings of Comedy achieves the seemingly impossible task of capturing the rollicking and sly comedy routines of stand-up and sitcom vets Steve Harvey, D.L. Hughley, Cedric the Entertainer, and Bernie Mac and the magic of experiencing a live concert show. Director Spike Lee and his crew plant a multitude of cameras in a packed stadium and onstage (as well as backstage, as they follow the comedians) to catch the vivid immediacy of the show, which is as much about the audience as it is about the jokes.
results.title: The Original Kings of Comedy

results.original_title: Comedy Central Roast of James Franco
results.overview: It's James Franco's turn to step in to the celebrity hot seat for the latest installment of The Comedy Central Roast.
results.title: Comedy Central Roast of James Franco

results.original_title: Comedy Central Roast of Bruce Willis
results.overview: Bruce Willis goes from "Die Hard" to dead on arrival as some of the biggest names in entertainment serve up punches of their own to Hollywood's go-to action star. And with Roast Master Joseph Gordon-Levitt at the helm, nobody is leaving the dais unscathed.
results.title: Comedy Central Roast of Bruce Willis

results.overview: When an out of work actress unexpectedly lands a starring role in the sexually explicit mini-series adaptation of a best selling erotic novel, her aimless, stoner boyfriend does his best to be supportive. But when her volatile, Oscar winning co-lead takes "rehearsals" too far, her dream job becomes her boyfriend’s worst nightmare and the couple is forced to decide whether or not their relationship is worth fighting for.
results.title: The Dramatics: A Comedy
